instruction: 把员工考核情况记录一下

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = '员工'
ws['B1'] = '完成率(%)'
ws['C1'] = '评级'
ws['A2'] = '刘洋'
ws['B2'] = 95
ws['C2'] = '优秀'
ws['A3'] = '陈静'
ws['B3'] = 82
ws['C3'] = '良好'
ws['A4'] = '林峰'
ws['B4'] = 88
ws['C4'] = '良好'
ws['A5'] = '黄丽'
ws['B5'] = 97
ws['C5'] = '优秀'
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/employee_kpi.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: 把员工考核情况记录一下
从/home/user/Desktop/employee_kpi.xlsx中找到评级为'优秀'的员工，在/home/user/Desktop/kpi_record.txt末尾追加：'优秀员工：刘洋、黄丽'，保存
